languages.text: "Неумирающий даст указание, когда 32-ому полку потребуется нанести удар, Домин. Я стану провозвестницей возмездия".
"The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."
languages.original_text: "Неумирающий даст указание, когда 32-ому полку потребуется нанести удар, Домин. Я стану провозвестницей возмездия".

traits.locale_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."
"The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."
"The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

languages.text: 「不死の者よ、32連隊が攻撃すべき時を告げてください。私は報復の使者となる」
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: 「不死の者よ、32連隊が攻撃すべき時を告げてください。私は報復の使者となる」

languages.text: «El Inmortal nos dará una señal cuando llegue el momento para que el 32.º regimiento ataque, Domin. Seré la heraldo de su castigo».
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: «El Inmortal nos dará una señal cuando llegue el momento para que el 32.º regimiento ataque, Domin. Seré la heraldo de su castigo».

languages.text: “不死之神会降下征兆，秘者。第32团进攻时机到来之时，我便是那复仇的宣告者。”
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: “不死之神会降下征兆，秘者。第32团进攻时机到来之时，我便是那复仇的宣告者。”

languages.text: "Der Todlose wird uns ein Zeichen geben, wenn das 32. Regiment zuschlagen muss, Domin. Ich werde der Herold der Vergeltung sein."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: "Der Todlose wird uns ein Zeichen geben, wenn das 32. Regiment zuschlagen muss, Domin. Ich werde der Herold der Vergeltung sein."

languages.text: "32. Alay'ın ne zaman saldırması gerektiği konusunda Ölmeyen bize işaret verecek Domin. Cezanın habercisi ben olacağım."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: "32. Alay'ın ne zaman saldırması gerektiği konusunda Ölmeyen bize işaret verecek Domin. Cezanın habercisi ben olacağım."

languages.text: « Quand il sera temps pour le 32e régiment de frapper, l'Immortel nous enverra un signe, Domin. Je serai le héraut de notre vengeance. »
languages.original_text: "The Undying One will give us a sign when the 32nd Regiment must strike, Domin. I will be the herald of retribution."

traits.locale_text: « Quand il sera temps pour le 32e régiment de frapper, l'Immortel nous enverra un signe, Domin. Je serai le héraut de notre vengeance. »
